issues.objection: Tags on 7.26 (operator-system-coupling, team-state, system-recognition) cohere with same-tag verses across chapters. STRETCHED tagging keeps the operational scope honest where metaphysical reach exceeds it. The STRETCHED tag is honest for this verse: Verse claims structural mystery across the threefold time. Engineering analog scoped narrowly at single-career, single-system asymmetry between substrate-vantage and surface-vantage. Counter-example: senior knowledge that resists transmission is pathology.

notes: Doctrine-coherence test for 7.26: same-tag verses across chapters preserve consistent stance; the verse extends the doctrine without contradicting prior chapters. PASS.
